company.name: Elementor
company.notes: WordPress page builder. AI content surfaces. Consumer brand.

research.status_summary: Elementor is actively product-shipping and hiring (careers page open), with no 2025–2026 layoff signals; the last known layoff was a 2022 marketing-department cut of ~60 staff amid recession fears.
research.hiring_policy: Elementor is an Israeli-headquartered company (Ramat Gan) with a global distributed workforce; no public 2026 statements on visa sponsorship or EOR policy were found, but prior remote-friendly posture and Israeli R&D core suggest limited visa sponsorship and cautious EOR openness for non-Israel roles.
recent_news: May 12, 2026 – Elementor officially launched 'Angie,' billed as the world's first agentic AI plugin for WordPress; Angie Code lets users build custom widgets, snippets, and apps from plain-language prompts with a sandboxed test environment before going live.

June 2, 2026 – Elementor shipped another Angie update ('Angie in the Atomic Editor'), enabling AI generation of Forms, Variables, and Classes directly inside the new V4 Atomic Editor system, deepening the no-code/AI-assisted workflow.

2026 – Elementor launched 'Elementor One' ($168/yr unified subscription), bundling Editor Pro, AI Site Planner, managed cloud hosting, and 25,000 monthly AI credits into a single workspace, signaling a platform consolidation strategy.
research.growth_signal: Headcount sits at ~508 employees as of April 2026 (up from ~466 in 2025 per PitchBook), the platform powers 13%+ of the web and 21M+ sites, and the company is aggressively expanding its AI surface area with Angie, Elementor One, and the V4 Atomic Editor — all shipped within a 6-month window with no new external funding announced.
research.fit_for_lior: Strong fit for Lior's Creative AI and Vibe Coder threads — Elementor's Angie agent (prompt-to-production-code, no coding required) and Elementor One's AI content/image surfaces are exactly the 'AI co-pilot for creators' category she covers, and a Product Analyst or AI content role here would sit at the intersection of WordPress ecosystem analytics and generative-AI UX evaluation.
